item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Truck Driver Detention Reform
item.description:
👀 Truck Driver Detention Reform

What

Federal truck driver detention reform in the 119th Congress addressing the uncompensated time drivers wait at shipper/receiver facilities.

What it does

  • Detention-time compensation standards · hours-of-service interaction clarity · electronic-logging-device data-portability.

Composes

#16 Brass Tacks (manufacturing supply chain logistics) · Worker Misclassification Reform.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
